title: Grudziądz, Kuyavian-Pomeranian — Cost of Living, Housing & Relocation Guide [2026]
description: Complete guide to Grudziądz, Kuyavian-Pomeranian: cost of living, home prices, neighborhoods, remote work readiness, and relocation tips.
content:
Overview

Grudziądz is a city in Kuyavian-Pomeranian with a population of 93,864. A historic city on the Vistula River, known for its impressive Gothic granaries, medieval old town, and a strong agricultural tradition.

Last updated: July 19, 2026
